rationale: Review 1 identifies multiple generality failures directly visible in the diff — general categorical facts (antipode preservation for BialgHoms, tensor-product-functor identity/composition) buried as `private` in a base-change file and thus inaccessible to the rest of the library, plus specialized `@[simp]` duplicates of Mathlib's more general lemmas. Acting on these findings would structurally improve the library. Review 2 catches only the `includeRight_apply` simp-normal-form issue (real but minor), missing the broader private/generality problems entirely.
